# Dhiren Narola — Odoo Architect & AI Automation Engineer

> Dhiren Narola is an Odoo 18 certified ERP architect and AI automation engineer
> based in Surat, India, working with international clients across the USA,
> Europe, the Middle East (Saudi Arabia, UAE), and Asia. 20+ Odoo ERP
> implementations delivered across 13 countries. Specialties: Odoo ERP
> implementation, ERP rescue and recovery, ZATCA Phase 2 e-invoicing compliance,
> WhatsApp Business API automation, and AI agents / LLM integrations for ERP.
> Also known as: Dhiren, Narola, Dhiren Narola Odoo developer.

Contact: hello@dhirennarola.com · https://dhirennarola.com/contact/

## Services

- [ERP Implementation](https://dhirennarola.com/services/erp-implementation/): Full Odoo implementations — architecture to go-live, one accountable expert
- [ERP Rescue](https://dhirennarola.com/services/erp-rescue/): Recovery of failed or stalled Odoo/ERP projects
- [AI + Odoo](https://dhirennarola.com/services/ai-odoo/): AI agents, LLM integrations, and automation layered on Odoo ERP
- [Integrations & e-Invoicing](https://dhirennarola.com/services/integrations-einvoicing/): ZATCA Phase 2 (Saudi Arabia), WooCommerce, WhatsApp Business API
- [Dedicated Team](https://dhirennarola.com/services/dedicated-team/): Ongoing Odoo development capacity

## Case Studies

- [KSA Automotive ERP](https://dhirennarola.com/work/ksa-automotive-erp/): Multi-branch automotive ERP in Saudi Arabia with ZATCA compliance
- [Pharma Manufacturing ERP](https://dhirennarola.com/work/pharma-manufacturing-erp/): Odoo MRP for pharmaceutical manufacturing
- [Elevator Maintenance Automation](https://dhirennarola.com/work/elevator-maintenance-automation/): Field-service and maintenance automation with WhatsApp integration
- [IT Services Billing](https://dhirennarola.com/work/it-services-billing/): Automated billing for a US IT services company
- [Jewellery Sales Tags](https://dhirennarola.com/work/jewellery-sales-tags/): Odoo customization for jewellery retail
